entry.title: Bill 32 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
RELATES TO PUBLIC IMPROVEMENTS AND FINANCING THEREOF FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Draft 2 requires a total appropriation of $603,015,000, of which $532,586,000 are intended to be funded in whole or part by bonds, $36,752,000 to be funded by Federal Grants, $30,000,000 to be funded by State Grants, and $3,677,000 to be funded by Community Benefit Assessments and other funds.

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-06-05

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 32 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
RELATES TO PUBLIC IMPROVEMENTS AND FINANCING THEREOF FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Draft 2 requires a total appropriation of $603,015,000, of which $532,586,000 are intended to be funded in whole or part by bonds, $36,752,000 to be funded by Federal Grants, $30,000,000 to be funded by State Grants, and $3,677,000 to be funded by Community Benefit Assessments and other funds.

Latest action: Council: Bill 32, Draft 4 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25

View on the council site
